description: Lemon Squeezy is an ecommerce and merchant-of-record platform for selling digital products, software, and subscriptions. It provides tools for checkout, subscriptions, licensing, customer management, and related store operations.
summary: Lemon Squeezy exposes a documented REST API at `https://api.lemonsqueezy.com/v1/`, authenticated with a dashboard-generated API key sent as a Bearer token; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found.
